sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا أَشْعُرُ بِصُدَاعٍ شَدِيدٍ، أَذْهَبُ إِلَى الصَّيْدَلِيَّةِ لِشِرَاءِ الدَّوَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Kada osjetim jaku glavobolju, idem u apoteku da kupim lijek.
sentences.translationEn: When I feel a severe headache, I go to the pharmacy to buy medicine.

sentences.arabic: يَشْرَحُ الصَّيْدَلَانِيُّ لِي كَيْفِيَّةَ اسْتِخْدَامِ الدَّوَاءِ بِشَكْلٍ صَحِيحٍ.
sentences.translation: Farmaceut mi objašnjava kako da pravilno koristim lijek.
sentences.translationEn: The pharmacist explains to me how to use the medicine correctly.

sentences.arabic: مِنَ الْمُهِمِّ قِرَاءَةُ التَّعْلِيمَاتِ الْمَوْجُودَةِ عَلَى الْعُلْبَةِ بِعِنَايَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Važno je pažljivo pročitati uputstva na kutiji.
sentences.translationEn: It is important to read the instructions on the box carefully.
